findings.title: Authentication Weakness Detected
findings.description: High risk identified in the authentication process, potentially exposing user accounts to unauthorized access due to weak authentication mechanisms.
assumptions: Authentication mechanisms are not robust enough to prevent unauthorized access.

evidence.excerpt: Detected auth risk keywords in 5 source(s)

recommendations: Enhance authentication mechanisms to include multi-factor authentication.

metadata.mitigation: Implement multi-factor authentication and conduct a security review of the authentication flow.

findings.title: Increased Support Volume Due to Irrelevant Results
findings.description: The spike in support ticket volume indicates a significant user experience issue stemming from irrelevant search results, which could lead to user dissatisfaction and churn.
assumptions: Users are experiencing a decline in search relevance, leading to increased support requests.

evidence.excerpt: Increased support ticket volume due to irrelevant results

recommendations: Implement changes to the search algorithm to improve relevance.

metadata.mitigation: Address the search algorithm to enhance relevance and reduce support tickets.

findings.title: Accessibility Risk Identified
findings.description: Low severity accessibility risk detected, indicating potential issues with compliance to WCAG standards.
assumptions: Accessibility features may not fully meet WCAG AA standards.

evidence.excerpt: Detected accessibility risk keywords in 1 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a thorough accessibility audit to ensure compliance with WCAG AA.

metadata.mitigation: Perform an accessibility audit and implement necessary changes.
metadata.policy_rule: Accessibility is a requirement, not an afterthought

findings.title: Data Handling Compliance Risk
findings.description: Potential violation of data retention policy as the system may not be adequately enforcing the 90-day retention limit for PII.
assumptions: Data retention policies are not being enforced effectively.
recommendations: Implement automated data deletion processes to ensure compliance with retention policies.

metadata.mitigation: Establish automated processes for data deletion to comply with retention policies.

summary: Identified 4 risks (1 accessibility, 1 privacy, 1 security, 1 user experience). 2 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (3 blockers, 1 warnings).
